overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a player character entering a dimly lit, industrial quarters. The character approaches two seated NPCs—a woman at a metal table and a man on a wall bench—in a compact room with riveted metal walls and minimal furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact industrial quarters with metal furnishings

events.description: character enters the dimly lit quarters through a metal doorway

agents.ego_description: walking into the room and approaching the central table where a woman is seated

notable_agents.action: woman seated at the table, facing away and working
man seated on a bench against the left wall, observing

entered.detail: metal door frame leading into the quarters
rectangular metal table with a green surface
white plastic chair near the table
large oval window with closed metallic blinds
tall metal shelving unit against the right wall
built-in bench or bed along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player character enters a narrow, industrial quarters through a metal doorway. The room features riveted metal walls, a central table with a green top, and a large oval window with blinds on the right. Two NPCs are present: a woman seated at the table facing away, and a man sitting on a bench to the left. The camera moves steadily forward into the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: close interaction area at the metal table

events.description: seated woman turns her head and body to face the approaching player character
camera turns slightly left toward the man seated on the bench

agents.ego_description: standing at the table engaging with the woman who has turned to face them, then glancing toward the man

notable_agents.action: woman now facing the player, making eye contact while seated
man remains seated on the bench, watching the interaction

entered.detail: small globe on a stand sitting on the table
stack of books or data pads on the table
metal mug sitting next to the books

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the table where the seated woman turns to face them, establishing eye contact. Details on the table become visible including a small globe, stacked books, and a metal mug. The camera then shifts slightly left, bringing the man on the bench into clearer view while the doorway recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a narrow industrial entrance into the intimate interior of a dimly lit quarters. It begins as the camera passes through a metal doorway, gliding into a room defined by riveted walls and a large oval window with blinds. As the camera advances toward the center of the space, the woman seated at a green-topped table turns to face the viewer, bringing a small globe, stacked books, and a metal mug into sharp focus. The perspective then shifts slightly to the left, bringing the man on the wall bench into clear view while the entrance recedes into the background.
